title: senecio maulinus
intro: Senecio maulinus, also known as groundsel tree or Senecio, is a plant species in the dandelion family with yellow flowers that resemble dandelion blooms, but grow in clusters. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a purgative and diuretic, helping to remove toxins from the body and treat conditions such as fever and rheumatism. The health benefits of Senecio maulinus include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and joint pain. Traditionally, Senecio maulinus is used in herbal preparations, including infusions and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
